title: Salty Canadian Roast Grill
description: A hearty and savory dish featuring a roast, salt, and a variety of aromatics, perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Season the beef roast with kosher salt, brown sugar, and olive oil.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef roast on all sides until browned, about 5 minutes per side.
Add the onion, garlic, carrots, potatoes, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and roast the beef and vegetables for 2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly before slicing the beef and serving
